intro: APT41, CrystalX, and Fast16 were the most active threat actors in credential-theft incidents tracked by ZCyberNews between April 12 and April 29, 2026. The 21 articles covering this period highlighted CVE-2026-33829 as the top vulnerability exploited, with technology, software development, cloud services, and enterprise sectors most affected globally, including Europe, North America, Bangladesh, and South Asia. The severity mix comprised five critical, 14 high, one medium, and one informational report.
